summary: Comprehensive testing of Raw Surf OS auth flows - 3 category signup (Surfer, Photographer, Business) with routing to subscription/onboarding pages. 17/20 backend tests passed, all frontend UI flows working correctly.

minor.issue: Grom signup without parent email returns 500 instead of 400 (HTTPException caught by generic exception handler)
Destination role signup returns 500 - enum 'DESTINATION' not found in database. DB enum may not have been migrated to include DESTINATION role
Duplicate email signup returns 500 instead of 400 (HTTPException caught by generic exception handler)

action_items: Fix exception handling in signup endpoint - re-raise HTTPException before catching generic Exception
Add DESTINATION enum to PostgreSQL database (requires DB migration or direct ALTER TYPE command)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 246-249: Generic exception handler catches HTTPException and converts to 500. Should re-raise HTTPException: `if isinstance(e, HTTPException): raise`
models.py has DESTINATION enum but database may not have been migrated to include it
test_credentials: All test accounts created with unique emails like test_surfer_<timestamp>@example.com
seed_data_creation: Test accounts created during testing for various roles: Surfer, Photographer, Hobbyist, Shop, Approved Pro
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth signup flows fully tested. Three minor backend issues identified but don't break core functionality. All signup categories (Surfer, Photographer, Business) working with correct redirect paths. Subscription pages show correct pricing ($0/$1.99/$9.99 for surfers, $18/$30 for photographers). Pro Onboarding page has portfolio form.

verified_features.auth_landing_3_ctas: PASS - 'Get Started', 'I Shoot Surf', 'Surf Co's' buttons present
verified_features.surfer_signup_4_roles: PASS - Grom, Surfer, Competitive, Pro roles displayed
verified_features.photographer_signup_4_roles: PASS - Grom Parent (Free), Hobbyist (Free), Photographer, Approved Pro roles displayed
verified_features.business_signup_6_types: PASS - Surf School, Surf Coach, Resort, Destination, Shop/Brand, Shaper displayed
verified_features.hobbyist_redirect_to_feed: PASS - Hobbyist signup skips subscription, goes to /feed
verified_features.business_redirect_to_feed: PASS - Business signup skips subscription, goes to /feed
verified_features.surfer_subscription_3_tiers: PASS - Free ($0), Basic ($1.99), Premium ($9.99) tiers shown
verified_features.pro_onboarding_portfolio_form: PASS - Portfolio submission form displayed with required fields
